n: Blood of Azog: Fathers and Sons

Durin can be found in the war-room at Annâk-khurfu. You have collected all of the letters and parcels prepared by the Longbeards of the Gabil'akkâ. Yo…
King Thorin can be found at his throne in the Hall Under the Mountain at Erebor. Durin has written a missive to be delivered to his father, Thorin, at…
King Thorin can be found at his throne in the Hall Under the Mountain at Erebor. You should talk to King Thorin.
